---
title: "CV"
description: "A read-only copy of my full curriculum vitae — academic record, publications, teaching and trajectory."
keywords: "Gonzalo Llamosas CV, curriculum vitae, public finance, University of Málaga"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-viewer-pages" oncontextmenu="return false;">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-1.png" alt="CV page 1" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-2.png" alt="CV page 2" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-3.png" alt="CV page 3" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-4.png" alt="CV page 4" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-5.png" alt="CV page 5" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-6.png" alt="CV page 6" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
  <img src="pages/cv-page-7.png" alt="CV page 7" class="cv-page" draggable="false">
</div>
```
